Antiquarian & rare · Est. MMXV

A library of second lives

First editions, out-of-print treasures, and well-loved volumes — each one catalogued, graded, and waiting for its next reader.

Browse the collection
Everything on the shelves

A wall of stories

Genre in focus

Nature & place writing

The landscape essay is having a quiet renaissance. These are the books that walk you out of the house and into the weather — attentive, unhurried, and a little in love with the world.

Explore the genre
Bestseller of the month · by Tomás Iriarte

Where the Rivers Remember

A drowned valley gives up its secrets one summer, and a hydrologist returns to the village her family left behind. A sweeping novel about water, memory, and the things we choose to bury.

$18.00 $24.00
Shop it now

What readers say

"Booky is the only shop that feels like walking into a friend's study. Every parcel arrives wrapped like a gift, and the recommendations are uncannily right."
Mira Castellan · Reader since 2019
